global.description: The ad features a dark background with a central product display and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting limited stock bestsellers with a call to action.

elements.label: Dark background
elements.description: A solid dark background that fills the entire canvas, providing contrast for the foreground elements.

elements.label: Product display area
elements.description: A rectangular area in the center featuring two vertical product images with a subtle gray outline.

elements.label: Limited stock message
elements.description: A bold, white text stating 'Limited stock' positioned prominently in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Shop bestsellers text
elements.description: A smaller white text below the main message that reads 'Shop bestsellers now'.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small, white text displaying the price '€9.99' located at the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rectangular button with white text 'Get offer' at the bottom center, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Main promotional message
elements.description: A prominent text in the center stating 'Limited stock Shop bestsellers now', designed to attract attention.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'BoltCart' displayed at the top left in bold, white letters against the dark background.

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A small button at the bottom center with the text 'Get offer', encouraging users to take action.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A small text at the bottom showing the price '€9.99', indicating the cost of the product.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, bright yellow badge at the top right corner with the text 'SALE', highlighting a promotional offer.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag at the top left corner labeled 'UGC', indicating user-generated content related to the products.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with bold text, limited stock promotion, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, the product display is in the middle, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Limited stock, Shop bestsellers now, BoltCart, Get offer, €9.99, SALE, UGC
